subject: Tilt series deselected with change_selection still processed
body: Hello! I'm having trouble with tilt series deselection using WarpTools change_selection. After running fs_motion_and_ctf and ts_import, I can see that several of my tilt series aren't worth processing (ice contamination, bad tracking, grid bars blocking the view, etc.) so I run: WarpTools change_selection --settings warp_tiltseries.settings --deselect --input_data tomostar/Position_1_4.tomostar. For each excluded tilt series I can confirm success by reading the XML (UnselectManual="True"). However, when I run later analyses all positions are processed even the "unselected" ones. For example, I ran ts_ctf and power spectra were generated for all positions. This is true for other commands also, for example ts_aretomo also processes all positions. Am I misusing or misunderstanding change_selection? Running WarpTools 2.0.0 from SBGrid on Rocky 8.10.
